item.aggregated_output:
578	в”Ңв”Җв”Җ Worker Daemon (host, has network) в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
   579	в”Ӯ  IPC Watcher (inotify/polling /workspace/ipc/):     в”Ӯ
   580	в”Ӯ    loss.jsonl  вҶ’ parse + publish Redis Pub/Sub      в”Ӯ
   581	в”Ӯ    eval.jsonl  вҶ’ parse + POST /api/v1/internal/...   в”Ӯ
   582	в”Ӯ    events.jsonl вҶ’ update job_steps via internal API    в”Ӯ
   583	в”Ӯ    checkpoint/ вҶ’ upload to MinIO                    в”Ӯ
   584	в”Ӯ    should_stop вҶ’ touch file when cancel received    в”Ӯ
   585	в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
   586	```
   587	
   588	**FilesystemCallback** (ships with `salad_pipeline`):
   589	1. **`on_train_iteration()`** вҶ’ append `loss.jsonl` (6 fields: `loss_total, loss_st, loss_ae, loss_stae, loss_comp_recon, loss_comp_mask`)
   590	2. **`on_eval_end()`** вҶ’ append `eval.jsonl` (12 fields вҖ” see canonical list in Section 4)
   591	3. **`on_checkpoint_saved()`** вҶ’ write checkpoint dir to `/workspace/ipc/checkpoint/{iteration}/` + `.done` marker
   592	4. **`on_train_end()`** вҶ’ save `calibration.pt` + write final model artifacts to `/workspace/ipc/final/` + `.done` marker
   593	5. **`on_step_start/end()`** вҶ’ append `events.jsonl` with structured event
   594	6. **`should_stop()`** вҶ’ check if `/workspace/ipc/should_stop` file exists
   595	
   596	**Atomic write contract (prevents watcher from reading partial data):**
   597	- **JSONL files** (`loss.jsonl`, `eval.jsonl`, `events.jsonl`): Append a complete line ending with `\n` via a single `write()` syscall. Watcher reads only complete lines (ignore trailing partial line).
   598	- **Directories** (checkpoint, final): Write all files into `{dir}.tmp/`, then `os.rename("{dir}.tmp/", "{dir}/")` + `touch {dir}/.done`. Watcher ignores any directory without `.done` marker.
   599	- **Rationale:** `os.rename()` is atomic on same filesystem (guaranteed by POSIX). JSONL single-line append is atomic up to `PIPE_BUF` (4096 bytes on Linux, each line is ~200 bytes).
   600	
   601	**Worker Daemon IPC Watcher** (bГӘn ngoГ i container):
   602	- Watches `/workspace/ipc/` via `inotify` (Linux) hoбә·c polling (1s interval)
   603	- Forward metrics вҶ’ Redis Pub/Sub (cho WebSocket live streaming)
   604	- Forward eval results вҶ’ internal API (вҶ’ `training_evaluations` DB table)
   605	- Upload checkpoints вҶ’ MinIO, then **update `job_steps.last_checkpoint_path`** via internal API (only AFTER successful upload вҖ” partial/failed uploads do NOT update the column)

- Status: APPROVE
- Reason: No remaining cross-reference inconsistencies were found in the reviewed areas; the IPC architecture, resume flow, metric ownership/schema, config naming, storage paths, and internal worker API/auth contracts now align.
